headline: Is McKesson’s New US$2.25 Billion Term Loan Reshaping the Investment Case for MCK?
summary: Earlier in June 2026, McKesson amended its credit agreement to add a US$2.25 billion senior secured term B loan maturing in 2032, choosing a floating rate based on the Adjusted Term SOFR benchmark plus a margin to support liquidity and operational needs. This financing shift, coming soon after a revenue shortfall, an investment in the Medical-Surgical Solutions unit and increased CEO pay, highlights how capital structure, portfolio moves and governance decisions are all under close investor...
